name: OTP_Message
body:
ORBI Financial Technologies:

Hello {{name}}, your One-Time Password (OTP) for {{deviceName}} is {{otp}}. It will expire in 5 minutes.

For your security, do not share this code with anyone.

{{androidHash}}

name: OTP_Message
body:
ORBI Financial Technologies:

Habari {{name}}, msimbo wako wa muda (OTP) kwa kifaa {{deviceName}} ni {{otp}}. Msimbo huu utaisha muda wake ndani ya dakika 5.

Kwa usalama wako, usimpe mtu yeyote msimbo huu.

{{androidHash}}

name: OTP_Message
body: Hello {{name}}, your OTP for {{deviceName}} is {{otp}}. It expires in 5 minutes.

name: OTP_Message
body: Habari {{name}}, OTP yako kwa kifaa {{deviceName}} ni {{otp}}. Itaisha ndani ya dakika 5.

name: Welcome_Message
body:
ORBI Financial Technologies:

Hello {{name}}, welcome to ORBI! Your account is now active.

Continue enjoying our services, ORBI truly values your goals!

name: Welcome_Message
body:
ORBI Financial Technologies:

Habari {{name}}, karibu ORBI! Akaunti yako imeamilishwa.

Endelea kufurahia huduma zetu, ORBI tunathamini sana malengo yako!

name: Transfer_Sent
body:
ORBI Financial Technologies:

Ref: {{refId}}. You sent {{currency}} {{amount}}/= to {{recipientName}} at {{timestamp}}.

Continue enjoying our services, ORBI truly values your goals!

name: Transfer_Sent
body:
ORBI Financial Technologies:

Kumb: {{refId}}. Umetuma {{currency}} {{amount}}/= kwenda kwa {{recipientName}} saa {{timestamp}}.

Endelea kufurahia huduma zetu, ORBI tunathamini sana malengo yako!

name: Transfer_Received
body:
ORBI Financial Technologies:

Ref: {{refId}}. You received {{currency}} {{amount}}/= from {{senderName}} at {{timestamp}}.

Continue enjoying our services, ORBI truly values your goals!

name: Transfer_Received
body:
ORBI Financial Technologies:

Kumb: {{refId}}. Umepokea {{currency}} {{amount}}/= kutoka kwa {{senderName}} saa {{timestamp}}.

Endelea kufurahia huduma zetu, ORBI tunathamini sana malengo yako!

Security_Alert_Message

body: Habari {{name}}, salio lako liko chini ya {{threshold}}.

If this was not you, please contact support immediately: +255764258114
